variables.name: preview
renderAccordion
variables.defaultValue:
(
  args: AccordionStoryArgs
): { props: AccordionStoryArgs; template: string; moduleMetadata: { imports: unknown[] } } => ({
  props: args,
  moduleMetadata: { imports: [Accordion, AccordionPanel] },
  template: `
    <ui-lib-accordion [variant]="variant" [size]="size" [expandMode]="expandMode">
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="Overview">Overview content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="Details">Details content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
      <ui-lib-accordion-panel header="FAQ">FAQ content</ui-lib-accordion-panel>
    </ui-lib-accordion>
  `,
})

variables.name: renderButton
variables.defaultValue:
(args: Partial<ButtonStoryArgs>): { props: Partial<ButtonStoryArgs>; template: string } => ({
  props: args,
  template: `
    <ui-lib-button
      [variant]="variant"
      [size]="size"
      [color]="color"
      [disabled]="disabled"
      [loading]="loading"
      [appearance]="appearance"
      [icon]="icon"
    >
      {{ label }}
    </ui-lib-button>
  `,
})

variables.name: renderCard
variables.defaultValue:
( args: CardStoryArgs ): { props: CardStoryArgs; template: string; moduleMetadata: { imports: unknown[] } } => ({ props: args, moduleMetadata: { imports: [Card, Button] }, template: `
Card Title

Card with projected content and actions.

Secondary Action
`, })

variables.name: renderCheckbox
variables.defaultValue:
(
  args: Partial<CheckboxStoryArgs>
): { props: Partial<CheckboxStoryArgs>; template: string } => ({
  props: args,
  template: `
    <ui-lib-checkbox
      [label]="label"
      [description]="description"
      [variant]="variant"
      [size]="size"
      [disabled]="disabled"
      [indeterminate]="indeterminate"
      [checked]="checked"
    />
  `,
})

variables.name: renderInput
variables.defaultValue:
(args: Partial<InputStoryArgs>): { props: Partial<InputStoryArgs>; template: string } => ({
  props: args,
  template: `
    <ui-lib-input
      [label]="label"
      [placeholder]="placeholder"
      [variant]="variant"
      [size]="size"
      [disabled]="disabled"
      [required]="required"
      [error]="error"
    />
  `,
})

variables.name: renderLoginForm
variables.defaultValue:
(args: LoginFormStoryArgs): { props: LoginFormStoryArgs; template: string } => ({
  props: args,
  template: `
    <ui-lib-login-form
      [variant]="variant"
      [showSocialLogin]="showSocialLogin"
      [showRememberMe]="showRememberMe"
    />
  `,
})

variables.name: renderSelect
variables.defaultValue:
(
  args: Partial<SelectStoryArgs>
): { props: Partial<SelectStoryArgs> & { options: SelectOption[] }; template: string } => ({
  props: { ...args, options },
  template: `
    <ui-lib-select
      [label]="label"
      [placeholder]="placeholder"
      [variant]="variant"
      [size]="size"
      [disabled]="disabled"
      [required]="required"
      [invalid]="invalid"
      [multiple]="multiple"
      [searchable]="searchable"
      [loading]="loading"
      [options]="options"
    />
  `,
})

variables.name: renderTabs
variables.defaultValue:
(
  args: TabsStoryArgs
): { props: TabsStoryArgs; template: string; moduleMetadata: { imports: unknown[] } } => ({
  props: args,
  moduleMetadata: { imports: [Tabs, Tab] },
  template: `
    <ui-lib-tabs [variant]="variant" [size]="size" [align]="align" [orientation]="orientation">
      <ui-lib-tab label="Overview">Overview content</ui-lib-tab>
      <ui-lib-tab label="Details">Details content</ui-lib-tab>
      <ui-lib-tab label="Settings">Settings content</ui-lib-tab>
    </ui-lib-tabs>
  `,
})
